title: [w]Case overview
noAccessBodyEcm: [w]This case is now being managed in ECM and is not available through this service.
noAccessBodyCrossCountry: [w]This case has been transferred and is not available through this service.
transferPendingBody: [w]Your case is being transferred. Your new case number will be available here once the transfer is complete. Please check back later.
whatThisMeansPointOne: [w]You cannot view case details or upload documents here.
whatThisMeansPointTwo: [w]Updates and decisions will not appear in this service.
whatHappensNextPointOne: [w]The tribunal will contact you by post or email with updates.
whatHappensNextPointTwo: [w]If you have any questions or need to contact the tribunal, you can do so, quoting your new case number
contactHeader: [w]Call the Employment Tribunal customer contact centre
